query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gs1_esrs_mappings) as esrs_mappings,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gs1_attribute_esrs_mapping) as attribute_mappings,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM esrs_datapoints) as esrs_datapoints,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT esrs_standard) FROM gs1_esrs_mappings) as unique_standards
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 31QbGTVHxF7ThTp.root --database cozU6EotfgGjqPV9552owj --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gs1_esrs_mappings) as esrs_mappings,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gs1_attribute_esrs_mapping) as attribute_mappings,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM esrs_datapoints) as esrs_datapoints,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT esrs_standard) FROM gs1_esrs_mappings) as unique_standards
